name: a committed CloudFormation stack-policy posture is consumed into a grounded design concern
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-translate.sh" --profile v11.json --out req.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null; ruby -rjson -e 'p=JSON.parse(File.read("req.json")); c=p["pillars"].values.flatten; sp=c.find{|x|x["concern"]=="stack_protection"}; exit(sp && sp["source_id"]=="aws-cloudformation-best-practices" && sp["grounding"]=="grounded" ? 0:1)' && echo cfn-commitment-steers 1>&2
setup: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "AWS with CloudFormation and Terraform" --answers p.json --probe-answer cfn:cfn_stack_policy=protected --partial --out v11.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1
